questions.question: How much of the year does the prohibition of gas leaf blowers last? What date in the year does it start, and what date does it end?
questions.answer: Not specified in the provided sources.
questions.gap: The provided sources contain no provisions regarding gas leaf blower prohibitions, seasonal restrictions, or date-specific bans. Best practice suggests a year-round prohibition with limited seasonal exceptions (e.g., March 15–May 15 and October 1–December 31 for gas blower use). This statute appears to lack any such provisions entirely.
